name: amanerp-second-opinion
description: Safety-first independent advisory and pull-request reviews for local Codex workflows

interface.shortDescription: Independent advice and read-only PR reviews.
interface.longDescription: Obtain a bounded second opinion or evidence-oriented pull-request review through your separately installed Claude Code CLI, with enforced Opus quality profiles, verified answering-model telemetry, no model tools, strict ceilings, and durable local provenance receipts. AmanERP is not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic.
defaultPrompt: Use $independent-advisory to obtain a second opinion on this decision.
Use $independent-pr-review to adversarially review this pull request.
Use $independent-pr-review to review this supplied diff without changing files.
